objects.query: SELECT DeveloperName, Language, MasterLabel FROM AssessmentQuestionConfig
SELECT DeveloperName, Language, MasterLabel FROM AssessmentQuestionSetConfig

SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, DataType, Description, DeveloperName, Name, QuestionCategory, QuestionText, RelatedQuestionId, ShouldExcludeFromMetadata, ShouldHideInDesigner, UniqueIndex FROM AssessmentQuestion
SELECT DeveloperName, Name, UniqueIndex FROM AssessmentQuestionSet
SELECT AssessmentQuestionId, AssessmentQuestion.UniqueIndex, AssessmentQuestionSetId, AssessmentQuestionSet.UniqueIndex FROM AssessmentQuestionAssignment

SELECT AdditionalInformation, AssessmentQuestion.UniqueIndex, CurrencyIsoCode, Description, GuidanceInformation, HelpText, IsActive, IsOptionSourceResponseValue, Name, QuestionText, ResponseValues FROM AssessmentQuestionVersion WHERE Status = 'Active'

SELECT IsMetadataCacheDisabled, IsTestProcedure, Description, OverrideKey, Name, OmniProcessKey, Language, PropertySetConfig, LastPreviewPage, OmniProcessType, ElementTypeComponentMapping, SubType, ResponseCacheType, IsOmniScriptEmbeddable, CustomJavaScript, IsIntegrationProcedure, VersionNumber, DesignerCustomizationType, Namespace, Type, RequiredPermission, WebComponentKey, IsWebCompEnabled, UniqueName FROM OmniProcess WHERE OmniProcessType='Omniscript'
SELECT DeveloperName, Language, MasterLabel FROM OmniScriptConfig

SELECT Description, DesignerCustomizationType, DiscoveryFrameworkUsageType, EmbeddedOmniScriptKey, IsActive, Level, Name, OmniProcessId, OmniProcess.UniqueName, PropertySetConfig, SequenceNumber, Type FROM OmniProcessElement
SELECT AssessmentQuestionVersionId, AssessmentQuestionVersion.Name, IsPrefill, OmniProcessElementId, OmniProcessElement.Name, OmniProcessId, OmniProcess.UniqueName FROM OmniProcessAsmtQuestionVer
